items.title: Infosys Stats Centre
items.summary: Formula E is Change.Accelerated. Get the latest news, video highlights, race results, calendar, team & driver profiles for the all-electric racing series.

items.title: António Félix Da Costa
items.summary: Antonio Felix da Costa is one of the most experienced Formula E drivers on the grid, a popular fixture in the series since Season 1. The Season 6 champion is one of the biggest movers of the season, taking his race-winning and overtaking prowess from Porsche to rivals Jaguar TCS

items.title: Maximilian Günther
items.summary: Maximilian Günther knows how to win, so well, that two of his collection came on the final lap. He’s currently the youngest winner in Formula E history, and holds the accolade of the first to win a PIT BOOST race, two of which came in the closing stages. He continues with DS PENS

items.title: NISSAN FORMULA E TEAM
items.summary: Nissan arrive into Season 12 with championship success in its hands as Oliver Rowland raised the Drivers' title for the first time. The team has some consistency in their line-up as Rowland will be joined by Norman Nato in the hunt to add to the championship tally in 2025/26.

items.title: ANDRETTI FORMULA E
items.summary: Andretti is a mainstay of Formula E, as an entrant since the inaugural 2014/15 campaign. Jake Dennis delivered a Drivers' title to the American outfit at the dawn of the GEN3 era. The Brit continues with the team for his sixth campaign and will be partnered by the promising new r

items.title: LOLA YAMAHA ABT FORMULA E TEAM
items.summary: A splash of yellow and blue joined the grid last season with the formation of Lola Yamaha ABT lining up on the grid. A debut podium came for the team in Season 11 thanks to the experience of Lucas di Grassi, who remains with the team alongside the returning Zane Maloney.
items.imageAlt: LOLA YAMAHA ABT FORMULA E TEAM

items.title: PORSCHE FORMULA E TEAM
items.summary: After more than 30 years, Porsche returned to top-flight single-seater racing for the 2019/20 season. Straight up to speed, the legendary German marque finally lifted the Drivers' trophy in Season 10 with Pascal Wehrlein. The German has a new teammate for Season 12, as Nico Mülle
